mapper.select: SELECT * FROM shelter_member WHERE shelter_id = #{shelterId} ORDER BY join_date DESC
SELECT * FROM shelter_member WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY join_date DESC
SELECT * FROM shelter_member WHERE role = #{role} ORDER BY join_date DESC
SELECT * FROM shelter_member WHERE shelter_id = #{shelterId} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shelter_member WHERE shelter_id = #{shelterId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shelter_member WHERE role = #{role}
mapper.update: UPDATE shelter_member SET role = #{role} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE shelter_member SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM shelter_member WHERE shelter_id = #{shelterId} AND role = #{role} ORDER BY join_date DESC
